title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the CT genotype (one copy of the CFTR P67L variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information and CPIC guidelines indicate use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of P67L. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
